decisions.decision: PRD v3.2 corrections — cost model, revenue projections, ICF language, free tier
decisions.why: External AI review found 5 critical errors in PRD v3: (1) infra costs understated $20→$100/mo (Vercel Pro + Supabase Pro + Resend required); (2) COGS missing Deepgram $6.50/user ($2.50→$9.00, margin 97.5%→90.9%); (3) revenue projections unrealistic for cold outreach — no existing coaching network; (4) 'ICF-compliant' is legally risky (implies formal certification); (5) free tier limits too restrictive for acquisition (1/3/50 → 3/5/75).
